creator: alexbestms@wwu.de
text:
i believe this pr can be closed.

selecting 'Closed reports too' often let's the search request time out.
probably it timed in the 'gmirror' and 'gmirr' case, but not in the 'gmirro'
case which probably got issued a bit later when the gnats database was
experiencing less traffic.

as gavin said: issue is not reproducible.

cheers.
alex
